name: Four Seas Mercantile Holdings Limited
summary: Four Seas Mercantile Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and trades in snack foods, confectionery, beverages, frozen foods, noodles, and ham and ham-related products in Hong Kong and Mainland China. The company also offers milk powder, health food, sauces, sausages, biscuits, cakes, ice-creams, and candies and seaweed products. In addition, it engages in the food materials trading, e-commerce retailing of confectionery and food products, processing of chestnuts, property holding, and advertising agency businesses; and provides lunch box and tuck shop services, as well as transportation services. The company's retail business covers a specialty store, which includes Okashi Land that offers Japanese gift boxes, snacks and confectioneries; YOKU MOKU; Calbee Plus, concept store; and Foodfie. Its catering business includes Kung Tak Lam, Shanghai vegetarian cuisine; Sushiyoshi, a Michelin restaurant; Shiki Etsu, a Japanese style restaurant; Panxi Restaurant; Mori Caf√É¬© that is a Japanese restaurant; and Sushi Oh, a sushi restaurant chain The company offers its products through a distribution network that covers department stores, supermarkets, convenience stores, fast food restaurants, retailers, restaurants, bars, hotels, and airlines. Four Seas Mercantile Holdings Limited was founded in 1971 and is based in Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong.
